MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-22-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED ON DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION'S DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR TRESPASS IN PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OPPOSE THE DEMURRER, BUT SEEKS LEAVE TO AMEND, WHICH IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR CALTRANS IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE DEMURRER WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted on DEFENDANT State of California Department of Transportation's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT as follows:

Defendant State of California Department of Transportation's demurrer to the second cause of action for trespass in plaintiff's first amended complaint is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff does not oppose the demurrer, but seeks leave to amend, which is granted.

Counsel for Caltrans is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the demurrer was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2019 Continued To Sep-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
